title: SCI "Economic, Social and Cultural Standing of Provinces" (Jaygah-e Ostan-ha) — 28-chapter provincial indicator compendium, editions 1395-1399 and 1398-1402
source_org: Statistical Centre of Iran (SCI / Markaz-e Amar-e Iran), under the Plan and Budget Organization
download_url: https://amar.org.ir/Portals/0/Statistics/jaygah_eght-ejt-farh_ostan_1398-1402-14031214155505.xlsx , https://amar.org.ir/Portals/0/PropertyAgent/2810/Files/20145/NE_Jaygah_Ostan_1395-99_V2-14010404.xlsx , https://amar.org.ir/Portals/0/PropertyAgent/2810/Files/14897/N_Jaygah_Ostanha_IDAA_1400-06.pdf — retrieved via Wayback Machine because amar.org.ir is unreachable directly from this network (curl exit 35 SSL error, consistent with prior sessions' findings logged in SOURCES.md)

files.name: N_Jaygah_Ostanha_IDAA_1400-06.pdf
files.notes: IMPORTANT: the first Wayback snapshot tried (20251023171420 -> redirects to 20250418164717) is TRUNCATED at 5,242,880 bytes by the Wayback/CommonCrawl WARC capture (server sent 'warning: 299 wayback content truncated by length'; x-archive-orig-content-length reports true size 12,623,688 bytes). The 20250323144111 snapshot used here is the complete, untruncated capture -- verified via pdfinfo (clean parse, no xref/endstream errors, 193 pages) vs the truncated one (xref errors, 'Missing endstream'). Always cross-check Content-Length against x-archive-orig-content-length when pulling large files from Wayback.

time_coverage: xlsx files: mostly 1394, 1396-1402 (SH) depending on chapter/table, i.e. approx 2015/16-2023/24; PDF narrative report: published Shahrivar 1400 (Sept 2021), covers up to ~1400 (2021/22)
frequency: irregular SCI publication series (multi-year editions), underlying indicators mostly annual
units: varies by chapter/table (percent shares, rial amounts, counts, rates) -- see in-sheet Persian headers
license_terms: Not specified; official Government of Iran / SCI statistical publication
notes: THIS IS THE 'PROVINCES AT A GLANCE' NATIONAL SUMMARY TASK 1C ASKED FOR, and it substantially exceeds task 1a's Iran Data Portal find: each xlsx has 28 chapter-sheets covering nearly every major economic/social domain, each broken out by all 31 provinces plus a national total row and a provincial RANK column. Two editions downloaded: 1395-1399 (SH, ~2016/17-2020/21) and 1398-1402 (SH, ~2019/20-2023/24), giving overlapping/rolling coverage back to 1394 in places. Chapter 23 (حساب های ملی / National Accounts) contains 'Share of province in GDP at current prices' AND the oil-excluded version, with province RANK, for years 1396-1400 -- used to VERIFY the top-5 GDP-contributing provinces for task 1b (see top-provinces manifest note): Tehran (~20.6-24.4%), Khuzestan (~14.7-18.0%), Bushehr (~5.0-8.0%), Isfahan (~5.3-5.9%), Khorasan Razavi (~4.1-4.7%) -- these 5 sum to >50% of national GDP in every year 1396-1400; Fars (~4.0-4.5%) is consistently 6th, not top-5, contra the task's starting guess. Chapter 21 (هزینه و درآمد خانوار / Household Expenditure and Income) contains province-level average annual non-food/food urban and rural household expenditure figures for 1394, 1398-1402 -- this is SCI's own published AGGREGATE table derived from the annual Household Expenditure and Income Survey (HEIS/IHEIS), directly useful for task 2b without needing the raw IHEIS microdata; cross-referenced from data/raw/iheis-microdata-metadata/access-instructions.md rather than duplicated there. PDF report is the narrative companion analysis (Persian, RTL, 193 pages) explaining methodology and highlights for the 1395-1400 period. Given the depth here, no separate 31-provinces-worth of individual yearbooks were downloaded (task 1b explicitly deprioritized once 1a/1c succeeded).

failures.reason: amar.org.ir unreachable directly (curl exit 35 SSL_ERROR_SYSCALL) and no Wayback CDX captures found for this specific path
resolved to a truncated Wayback capture (5,242,880 of 12,623,688 bytes); recovered via an earlier snapshot timestamp (20250323144111) that was not truncated
